context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements the Akeneo attribute value locale/scope fallback priority, caches attribute option codes as a Map for label lookup, uses labels instead of raw option codes, validates required fields before publishing, and applies Akeneo completeness scores as a quality gate.

checklist.name: Locale+scope first fallback
checklist.description: Attribute value resolution tries locale+scope match first before falling back to less specific matches

checklist.name: Four-level fallback chain
checklist.description: Fallback priority implements all four levels: locale+scope, then locale-only (scope null), then scope-only (locale null), then neither (both null)

checklist.name: Attribute options as Map
checklist.description: Attribute options are stored in a Map (or equivalent key-value cache) indexed by attribute code, with values as a Map from option code to label string

checklist.name: Labels used not codes
checklist.description: Transformed product output contains human-readable labels (e.g., 'Blue', 'Medium') rather than raw option codes (e.g., 'CLR_BLU', 'SZ_M') for select-list attributes

checklist.name: Option code fallback
checklist.description: When no label is found for an option code, the code itself is returned as fallback rather than null or an error

checklist.name: Name validation
checklist.description: Products with a missing or empty name field are rejected/filtered out before reaching the storefront output

checklist.name: Image validation
checklist.description: Products without a primary image are rejected/filtered out before reaching the storefront output

checklist.name: Completeness gate
checklist.description: Only products with 100% completeness for the ecommerce channel are passed through (products with <100% ecommerce completeness are excluded)

checklist.name: Design doc explains fallback
checklist.description: pipeline-design.md (or equivalent documentation file) explains the locale/scope fallback priority order

checklist.name: Design doc explains caching
checklist.description: pipeline-design.md explains how attribute option labels are loaded and cached

checklist.name: Transformer file structure
checklist.description: Transformation logic is placed in lib/akeneo/product-transformer.ts (or equivalent path following the lib/akeneo/ convention)

checklist.name: Options loader separate
checklist.description: Attribute option loading/caching logic is separated from the transformation logic (in a distinct file or function)
